summary: Iteration 49: Digital Media Features Testing - All features verified working. Admin Digital Media tab with CRUD operations, Guardian Media tab with per-student toggles, Student My Music button and empty state all functioning correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All Digital Media features are implemented correctly and working
Admin portal has 'Digital Media' tab with Media Settings card, ENABLED toggle, pricing fields, Upload and YouTube buttons
Guardian Portal has 'Music & Media' tab showing Media Controls per student with ON/OFF toggles
Student Academy has 'My Music' button in header bar that shows StudentMediaLibrary component
Backend endpoints all return 200 status with correct response structures
seed_data_creation: One YouTube video 'Wholesome Kids Song' was already in the database. Test videos created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Digital Media features from iteration 49 are verified working. Features tested: 1) Admin Digital Media tab with settings toggle, pricing, and media list, 2) Admin Add YouTube Video form working, 3) Guardian Music & Media tab with per-student media toggles, 4) Student My Music button showing empty library state. Backend API endpoints all working: /api/admin/media-settings (GET/PUT), /api/admin/brand-media (CRUD), /api/guardian/children-media (GET), /api/students/{id}/media-preference (POST), /api/students/{id}/media-library (GET), /api/brand-media/for-story/{id} (GET).

admin_digital_media_tab.details: Digital Media tab shows: Media Settings card with ENABLED/DISABLED toggle, Price per Stream and Price per Download fields, Upload Audio/Video button, Add YouTube Video button, media list showing 'Wholesome Kids Song' with APPROVED and YOUTUBE badges

admin_add_youtube_video.details: Add YouTube Video form opens with Title, Artist, YouTube URL, Link to Brand fields. Submitting shows success toast 'YouTube video added' and form clears.

admin_media_toggle.details: ENABLED/DISABLED toggle button changes state and persists via API

guardian_music_media_tab.details: Music & Media tab visible in Guardian Portal tab bar. Shows 'Media Controls' section with list of all students, each with ON/OFF toggle button to enable/disable digital media

student_my_music_button.details: My Music button visible in Student Academy header bar. Clicking shows 'My Music & Media' section with empty state message 'No music yet - Songs and videos from your stories will appear here!'
